x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A tool for integrating dotnet fragments project. For building, packing, pushing

commands.name: list
commands.description: list the solutions have been added.

commands.name: update
commands.description: update the code repository to latest master version

commands.name: clone
commands.description: clone the code repository to pull the newest version on the master branch.

options.name: depth
options.description: create a shallow clone of that depth

options.name: branch
options.description: clone a repository with specify branch

options.name: arguments
options.description: additional arguments transmited to git clone command

commands.name: clean
commands.description: clean all the git repo directories

commands.name: build
commands.description: build the package references of project with the relative path, and integrate them in a solution.

commands.name: config
commands.description: start to configure setting with default editor.

commands.name: merge
commands.description: merge a config json file to integrate and override application configuration.

arguments.name: configFile
arguments.description: a json file contained icbt configuration information

commands.name: git
commands.description: execute git command for every repositorye.g. icbt git "submodule update IC.ProjectShared"icbt git "submodule update"icbt git pull

options.name: subfolder
options.description: specify a sub folder of git repository

arguments.name: arguments
arguments.description: The arguments of git format, will be transmitted to git.
